title: ZXSnake Visual Walkthrough
description: Take a visual tour of ZXSnake and explore its gameplay, progression, multiplayer, and arcade action.
summary: Explore ZXSnake through screenshots that showcase the gameplay, progression, and features that make every game unique.

images.caption: Begin your journey and grow your snake.
Survive longer and chase a new high score.
Every game is another opportunity to improve.

sections.heading: Take a Tour of ZXSnake
paragraphs: These screenshots introduce the main areas of ZXSnake, helping you become familiar with the game before or during play.
Follow the journey from your first game through to high-score chasing, achievements, and multiplayer competition.

featureShowcases.heading: Begin Your Adventure
featureShowcases.summary: Every game starts with a small snake and the challenge of surviving for as long as possible.
body: ZXSnake is easy to learn but rewarding to master. Every piece of food collected makes your snake longer while increasing the challenge of avoiding collisions.
The further you survive, the higher your score becomes.

image.caption: Every great run begins with a single piece of food.

featureShowcases.heading: Master Your Skills
featureShowcases.summary: Quick thinking, careful planning, and smooth movement are the keys to success.
body: As your snake grows, planning ahead becomes increasingly important. Learning to anticipate every turn will help you survive much longer and achieve higher scores.
Whether you're playing Solo or competing against others, strong fundamentals always make a difference.
bullets: Stay calm as the snake grows.

featureShowcases.heading: Play, Improve, Repeat
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins reward every game you play.
body: Every completed game helps you unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for higher scores on the Game Center leaderboards.
The more you play, the more rewarding every session becomes.

image.caption: Every game brings you closer to your next goal.
